title: Minimap component with annotation markers and viewport indicator
purpose: Provides a visual overview of document content with colored annotation markers and a draggable viewport indicator for scrolling.
module_context: Exports a Minimap component that renders annotation markers and a viewport indicator, along with helper functions for extracting markers from content and determining marker colors.

steps.content: Return the Tailwind color class corresponding to the marker type.
Map comment type to blue-400 color.
Map propose type to yellow-400 color.
Map approve type to green-400 color.
Map reject type to red-400 color.
Initialize an empty array to collect markers.
Split the content into individual lines.
Define regular expression patterns for each marker type.
Iterate through each line of content.
For each line, test against all marker patterns.
IF a pattern matches, create a marker with line number and type.
Add the marker to the collection and break to avoid duplicate markers.
Return the array of extracted markers.
Extract annotation markers from the document content.
Set up a click handler to calculate scroll position from click coordinates.
Calculate the vertical position and height of the viewport indicator.
Render the minimap container with background and cursor styling.
For each marker, render a colored indicator at the appropriate vertical position.
Render the viewport indicator with blue styling.
Calculate the vertical position of the click relative to the minimap.
Convert the click position to a scroll fraction between 0 and 1.
Invoke the scroll-to callback with the calculated position.
